dense_7b.description: Dense 8B — best balance of quality, speed, and LoRA compatibility
dense_7b.memory_note: ~4.6 GB on disk, ~6-8 GB RAM at runtime

dense_3b.description: Dense 3B — smaller fallback, does not match the current LoRA adapter
dense_3b.memory_note: ~2 GB on disk, ~4-6 GB RAM at runtime

moe_a27b.description: MoE 14.3B total / 2.7B active — experimental, weaker tool following
moe_a27b.memory_note: ~8 GB on disk, ~8-10 GB RAM at runtime

dense_1.5b.description: Dense 1.5B — smallest/fastest dense option, no matching LoRA adapter
dense_1.5b.memory_note: ~1 GB on disk, ~2-3 GB RAM at runtime
